Backstory:

The Vista dynasty ruled over all of eastern continent crushing the spirits of all their subjects and cut down all of those who stood against them with brutal efficiency. The Tikara dynasty had controlled over the eastern continent for centuries until a enemy far stronger then them appear.

It wasn't an invasion, I was a slaughter. Your fathers army pushed the Vista dynasty to their last city of Lio. Empress Sasha Vista now burdened with leading a crumbling empire after her mother was killed in battle. In a last ditch effort she offered herself as bride to you so she could continue her lineage.
